title: Collect and store propolis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and store propolis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to collect propolis

pcs.text: Identify and prepare hives suitable for propolis collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare hives suitable for propolis collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare hives suitable for propolis collection.

pcs.text: Clean and sanitise equipment to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and sanitise equipment to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise equipment to be used.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and take action to minimise risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and take action to minimise risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and take action to minimise risks.

pcs.text: Select, check, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Determine and implement propolis production strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and implement propolis production strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and implement propolis production strategy.

pcs.text: Stimulate propolis production by manipulating hive conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stimulate propolis production by manipulating hive conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stimulate propolis production by manipulating hive conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to collect propolis

elements.title: Collect and store propolis

pcs.text: Remove propolis from hive with minimum colony disturbance and care according to production strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove propolis from hive with minimum colony disturbance and care according to production strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove propolis from hive with minimum colony disturbance and care according to production strategy.

pcs.text: Comply with quality assurance and food safety requirements throughout propolis production process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with quality assurance and food safety requirements throughout propolis production process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with quality assurance and food safety requirements throughout propolis production process.

pcs.text: Observe personal hygiene requirements according to food health and safety standards and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe personal hygiene requirements according to food health and safety standards and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe personal hygiene requirements according to food health and safety standards and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Extract propolis according to production strategy and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Extract propolis according to production strategy and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Extract propolis according to production strategy and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store extracted propolis according to food safety standards, quality and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store extracted propolis according to food safety standards, quality and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store extracted propolis according to food safety standards, quality and workplace procedures.
